name: Sangkil Lee
bio: Sangkil completed his B.S. and M.S. in Materials Science and Engineering from Yonsei University and began his PhD in MIT DMSE in 2025. Prior to joining the MIT Bioelectronics Group, he developed a nanogap-based capacitive platform for hydrogen sensing. His current research focuses on designing multiferroic nanotransducers for neuromodulation. Outside the lab, he enjoys producing music and playing chess.
